meaning: n.阿朱那(印度古代梵文史诗<<摩诃婆罗多>>
examples: Krishna never scolded Arjuna, he did not let him feel guilty at all. He always uplifted Arjuna.
We had the same reverence for the whole Panjabi nation as for Bhima and Arjuna of the Mahabharata.
O Arjuna, this eternal soul within the body of every living entity is immortal; therefore you should not lament for any being.
We can also see similarities between the Arjuna-Aravinda de Silva combination and Sangakkara-Jayawardene combination.
Speaking with Correspondent Arjuna Ranawana recently, Ezam was guarded in his replies - and understandably so.
